quote: While you're scrolling, someone else is studying for the job you want.
author: Saksham Tripathi

quote: Dreams don't work unless you do.
author: John C. Maxwell

quote: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
author: Sir Albert Lorem

quote: The energy spent rereading old chats could build a project that changes your career.
author: Glenn Maxwell

quote: If someone choose to leave, let your success be the chapter they never expected.
author: Aniket Tripathi

quote: Stop checking their last seen. Check your GitHub commits instead.
author: Hardik Pandya

quote: Replace late-night overthinking with late-night coding.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Don't chase the one who walked away. Chase the version of yourself that never has to beg for attention.
author: Chris Gayle

quote: One heartbreak can either destroy your future or become the reason you create it.
author: Carlos Braithwaite

quote: Your tears won't change your life. Your discipline will.
author: The Great Khali

quote: Aaj kamayinga toh kal baith ke khayinga.. aa meri jaan.
author: Virat Kohli
